siteMetadata.title: Ghost Docs
siteMetadata.description: Everything you need to know about working with the Ghost professional publishing platform.

ghostPost.title: TED
ghostPost.excerpt:
All content from TED works with Ghost automatically via our OEmbed integration.
All you have to do is paste a URL!

If you're writing a post and you want to include a great TED [https://ted.com] 
talk you watched recently, the our TED integration is just what you're looking
for. Here's a quick guide for making TED and Ghost work together:

Copy the URL of the video
Grab the URL of the video you'd like to embed into your post or page

Paste it into the Ghost editor
When you paste it into the Ghos
ghostPost.meta_description: Share the greatest content from TED directly in your posts using an automatic OEmbed integration in Ghost. All you have to do is paste a URL 🎬

ghostPost.plaintext:
All content from TED works with Ghost automatically via our OEmbed integration.
All you have to do is paste a URL!

If you're writing a post and you want to include a great TED [https://ted.com] 
talk you watched recently, the our TED integration is just what you're looking
for. Here's a quick guide for making TED and Ghost work together:

Copy the URL of the video
Grab the URL of the video you'd like to embed into your post or page

Paste it into the Ghost editor
When you paste it into the Ghost editor it'll be automatically transformed into
a rich embed of the video you selected

Publish your post
That's all there is to it! Ghost interacts with TED via their OEmbed
[https://oembed.com/]  API in order to retrieve all the correct settings
automatically and serve your video in the best way possible.

Here's an example of the end result:

Enjoy!
ghostPost.html:
All content from TED works with Ghost automatically via our OEmbed integration. All you have to do is paste a URL!

If you're writing a post and you want to include a great TED talk you watched recently, the our TED integration is just what you're looking for. Here's a quick guide for making TED and Ghost work together:

Copy the URL of the video

Grab the URL of the video you'd like to embed into your post or page

Paste it into the Ghost editor

When you paste it into the Ghost editor it'll be automatically transformed into a rich embed of the video you selected

Publish your post

That's all there is to it! Ghost interacts with TED via their OEmbed API in order to retrieve all the correct settings automatically and serve your video in the best way possible.

Here's an example of the end result:

Enjoy!

tags.name: Utility
tags.meta_title: Utility Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Integrate your Ghost site with your favourite utility apps & tools to optimise your site & automate workflows. Connect with Netlify, Cloudinary and more!

tags.name: Automation
tags.meta_title: Automation Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Automate your workflows and connect all of your apps, tools and services with your Ghost publication with these sensible integrations!

tags.name: Content
tags.meta_title: Content Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Keep all of your favourite content tools and apps connected to your Ghost site with these integrations. Connect Unsplash, Twitter, Instagram & many more!

tags.name: Marketing
tags.meta_title: Marketing Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Connect your Ghost site to a wide range of your favourite Marketing tools and apps. Automate workflows, sync subscribers, create custom RSS and more!

tags.name: Email
tags.meta_title: Email Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Connect your email subscribers or your newsletter to your Ghost publication with these integrations. Sync up with Mailchimp, Drip, ConvertKit & more!

tags.name: Analytics
tags.meta_title: Analytics Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Connect your analytics directly with your Ghost publication with these sensible integrations. Find out how to integrate Google Analytics & more!

tags.name: Storage
tags.meta_title: Storage Integrations: Custom storage adapters  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Custom storage solutions for your Ghost publication content – Integrate with Cloudinary, Google Drive, Amazon S3, Azure, Backblaze and more!

tags.name: Community
tags.meta_title: Community Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Keep your community and your readers connected and connect your favourite apps and tools to your Ghost site, including Slack, Helpscout & many more!

tags.name: Surveys & Forms
tags.meta_title: Survey Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Add surveys & forms to your Ghost site via integrations with Google Forms, Typeform and SurveyMonkey. Find out how to gather data from your readers.

tags.name: SEO
tags.meta_title: SEO Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Ghost comes with most core SEO features baked in, plus you can use our integrations to extend this further with custom Twitter cards and full AMP support.

tags.name: Social
tags.meta_title: Social Media Integrations: Connect your favourite channels – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Ghost supports custom Twitter & Facebook cards  and the editor automatically embeds social media cards. Find out more about our social media integrations.

tags.name: Ecommerce
tags.meta_title: Ecommerce Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Connect your products with your Ghost publication with these ecommerce platform integrations. Connect with Shopify, Snipcart & more 💰
